ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accelerators" (
  "accelerator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accelerator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the accelerator */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the accelerator within the facility */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date the accelerator was commissioned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the accelerator (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the accelerator */,
  "manufacturer" INTEGER /* Manufacturer of the accelerator */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the accelerator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accelerator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accelerators_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tanks" (
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tank */,
  "accelerator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accelerator the tank belongs to */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the tank */,
  "num_cells" INTEGER /* Number of cells within the tank */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to build the tank */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Maximum pressure the tank can withstand */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature the tank can withstand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tanks_accelerator_id FOREIGN KEY ("accelerator_id") REFERENCES accelerators ("accelerator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operational_params" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of operational parameters */,
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tank the parameters apply to */,
  "eout" REAL /* Energy output in MeV/A */,
  "power" REAL /* Power consumption in kW */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameters were recorded */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who recorded the parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operational_params_tank_id FOREIGN KEY ("tank_id") REFERENCES tanks ("tank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "accelerator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accelerator the maintenance applies to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component being maintained */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the maintenance */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time required for the maintenance */,
  "actual_time" INTEGER /* Actual time taken for the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_accelerator_id FOREIGN KEY ("accelerator_id") REFERENCES accelerators ("accelerator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "accelerator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accelerator the component belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the component */,
  "supplier" INTEGER /* Supplier of the component */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_supplier FOREIGN KEY ("supplier") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_accelerator_id FOREIGN KEY ("accelerator_id") REFERENCES accelerators ("accelerator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "accelerator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accelerator where the experiment is conducted */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the experiment */,
  "funding_agency" INTEGER /* Funding agency for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_funding_agency FOREIGN KEY ("funding_agency") REFERENCES funding_agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_accelerator_id FOREIGN KEY ("accelerator_id") REFERENCES accelerators ("accelerator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the data belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., particle count, energy levels) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, physicist, admin) */,
  "department" INTEGER /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" INTEGER /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_job_title FOREIGN KEY ("job_title") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., data download, system update) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the system (e.g., login, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding agency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the funding agency */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the funding agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)
